title: Rust CCP-16: add test coverage for new queue fields in status_decodes_firmware_map
description: The test should assert the new txq_*/fwd_* fields default to 0 or test with explicit values. This is a codereview finding for completeness of CCP-16 load balancing support. Fix by updating test.
close_reason: Added explicit values and assertions in test for CCP-16 fields
